title: polystichum luctuosum
intro: Polystichum luctuosum, also known as the weeping fern or Chinese funeral needle fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Polystichum luctuosum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being dried or smoked for medicinal purposes.
